## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow `docs/development/COMMIT_CONVENTION.md`
- [ ] Tests, lint, and type checks pass
- [ ] Loading / empty / error / success / permission states handled
- [ ] No temporary, duplicate, or misplaced files
- [ ] Normal merge commit (no squash) so atomic history is preserved
